GET /api
GET /api/search
GET /api/customers
GET /api/customers/{id}
GET /api/products
GET /api/products/{code}

GET /api/rfqs/{id}

GET /api/quotes/{id}

GET /api/freight-quotes/{id}

GET /api/payments/{id}

GET /api/revenue-journals/{id}
